hero.headline: Your Finca — Connected, Secure, and Taking Care of Itself.
hero.subheadline: Reliable internet, cameras that actually work, smart home automation, and solar energy that's properly set up. We handle the technical side so you can simply enjoy your property — whether you're there or on the other side of the world.
hero.trustLine: Based in Almansa — local team serving property owners across southeast Spain

trustBadges.heading: Some of the Brands We Work With
trustBadges.note: We choose the right equipment for each property and explain everything during your free assessment — no jargon, no pressure.

servicesSection.heading: Everything Your Finca Needs
servicesSection.subheading: Reliable internet, proper security, smart automation, and energy that works — we take care of it all, and we make it simple.

connectivity.title: Reliable Internet
connectivity.shortDesc: Always-on internet for your finca — we install Starlink, add a mobile backup for peace of mind, and bring strong Wi-Fi to every corner of your property, including the pool, the gate, and the guest house.
connectivity.hero: Good internet at a rural finca shouldn't feel like a luxury — we make it a given.

starlink.title: Starlink Installation
starlink.body: Starlink is the best way to get fast, reliable internet at a rural finca — and we install it properly. That means a solid, permanent mount that handles Spanish winds without ever needing adjustment, correct positioning for the best possible signal, and clean cable routing throughout the property. No wobble, no signal drops during Levante storms.

wan.title: Backup Internet — Just in Case
wan.body: We pair your main connection with a 4G/5G mobile backup. If your primary internet goes down for any reason, the backup kicks in automatically within seconds — your cameras, alarms, and remote access stay online without you having to do anything. You may not even notice it happened.

ubiquiti.title: Strong Wi-Fi Everywhere on Your Property
ubiquiti.body: We design a Wi-Fi network that actually covers your whole property — not just the living room. Pool area, terrace, garages, the gate at the end of the driveway, a guest house across the garden. All connected, all fast. We use professional networking equipment made for exactly these kinds of environments.

items.q: Can you work with my existing router or internet setup?
items.a: Yes. We look at what you already have during the site visit and either work with it or recommend something better if it's not performing well enough — and we'll explain why.

items.q: How long does a typical installation take?
items.a: Most installations are done within 1–2 days depending on the size of the property and how many areas need coverage.

items.q: Will Starlink work at my finca?
items.a: Usually yes — rural fincas are actually ideal for Starlink. We check your location for a clear view of the sky before any commitment, so there are no surprises.

items.q: What happens if my internet goes down while I'm away?
items.a: If you have a backup connection set up, it switches over automatically within seconds. Your cameras, remote access, and any automations stay running — no manual intervention needed.

connectivity.pricingNote: Typical starting investment: from €900. Confirmed after free site assessment.

security.title: Smart Security
security.shortDesc: Cameras that send you a notification when a car pulls up — not every time a bird flies past. Footage is saved at your property, not in someone else's cloud, and you can check it from anywhere.
security.hero: Know what's happening at your property — even when you're thousands of kilometres away.

cameras.title: Cameras at Every Important Spot
cameras.body: We design and install camera systems that cover every entrance, the perimeter, and any blind spots specific to your property. Weatherproof, neatly installed, and powered directly through the network cable — no batteries to change, no messy wiring. You get full coverage that looks like it belongs there.

nvr.title: Your Footage, Stored at Your Property
nvr.body: Everything is recorded on a dedicated device at your finca — not uploaded to someone else's cloud. Your footage stays yours, private, and on-site. We size the storage for how many cameras you have and how many weeks of recordings you want to keep.

detection.title: Smart Alerts — Not Constant Alerts
detection.body: We set up each camera to actually understand what it's looking at. You'll get a message when a car turns up the driveway. Not when a cat walks past. Not when a branch moves in the wind. Just the things that actually matter — so you don't end up ignoring all your alerts.

items.q: Does my camera system need an internet connection to work?
items.a: No — everything records locally at the property regardless. Remote viewing over the internet is optional and always uses a secure, encrypted connection.

items.q: How many cameras do I need?
items.a: We work that out during the free site visit based on your property's layout, entrances, and any specific spots you want covered. No guessing beforehand.

items.q: Can I watch live footage from abroad?
items.a: Yes — securely. Your footage never goes through third-party servers without your explicit permission.

items.q: What happens to my cameras during a power cut?
items.a: We can fit a battery backup so your key cameras and the recording unit stay running during short outages. Combined with solar power this can be extended considerably.

security.pricingNote: Typical starting investment: from €1,200. Confirmed after free site assessment.

automation.title: Smart Automation
automation.shortDesc: Your gate opens from your phone. Your pergola closes when it rains. Your lights come on at sunset. We wire it all together and make it genuinely easy to use — no technical knowledge needed on your part.
automation.hero: Your finca can manage itself — and we'll make it simple enough that you'll actually use it.

gates.title: Gate Control From Your Phone
gates.body: We connect your existing gate motor — or fit a new one — so you can open and close it from your phone, wherever you are. Set a schedule, have it open automatically when you arrive, or trigger it from a camera notification. Every open and close is logged, so you always know who came and went.

weather.title: A Weather Station for Your Property
weather.body: We fit a professional weather station that reads the actual conditions at your finca — wind speed, rainfall, temperature, UV levels. Your automated systems respond to what's really happening on your land, not what a forecast says for the nearest town 30 kilometres away.

shades.title: Awnings and Pergolas That Look After Themselves
shades.body: Your pergola louvres, roller blinds, or retractable awnings can close automatically when the wind picks up or rain starts — protecting your investment without you having to do anything, or even be there. They open again when conditions are fine.

items.q: Do I need to be technically minded to use the system?
items.a: Not at all. We build simple interfaces around how you actually live. If you can use a phone, you can use the system — and we walk you through it before we leave.

items.q: Can you automate my existing gate?
items.a: In most cases yes. We assess your gate motor during the site visit and connect it if possible. If it's too old or incompatible, we'll let you know and recommend a suitable replacement.

items.q: Do automations keep working without internet?
items.a: Yes. The automation hub runs entirely at your property. Your gate, awnings, lighting, and any scheduled routines all continue to work with no internet connection whatsoever.

items.q: Can you integrate my existing smart home devices?
items.a: Most likely yes. The platform we work with supports a huge range of brands and devices. We check compatibility during the site visit — bring a list and we'll tell you what's possible.

automation.pricingNote: Typical starting investment: from €800. Confirmed after free site assessment.

energy.title: Solar & Energy
energy.shortDesc: We make the most of your solar setup, upgrade old batteries, monitor everything remotely, and shut off the water automatically if a leak is detected while you're away.
energy.hero: Your solar system should be working hard for you — we make sure it is, and we tell you when it isn't.

solar.title: Getting More From Your Solar Panels
solar.body: Many fincas have solar panels that were installed years ago and haven't been looked at since. We check how they're mounted, whether the angle is right for the Spanish sun, if anything is causing shading losses, and whether the wiring is still in good shape. There's often easy improvement available — and we'll tell you honestly if there isn't.

victron.title: Better Batteries That You Can Actually Monitor
victron.body: If your finca runs on an older battery bank, a modern lithium upgrade makes a significant difference — more usable capacity, longer lifespan, and much better performance in the Spanish heat. We install Victron systems, which let you check your battery level, power output, and system health from your phone at any time.

utilities.title: Smart Lighting and Water Shut-Off
utilities.body: Outdoor and landscape lighting that comes on automatically at dusk or when someone moves nearby. And for peace of mind when you're away: small sensors at your water supply points that automatically shut off the water if a leak is detected — stopping a small drip from turning into a flooded property.

items.q: Can you expand my existing solar system?
items.a: Yes. We check your current setup first — panels, batteries, wiring — and tell you honestly what's possible and what it would cost. Any grid-side electrical work is done through our certified local electrician partners.

items.q: How quickly does a battery upgrade pay for itself?
items.a: It varies, but many clients see payback within 4–6 years through lower grid bills and avoiding expensive battery replacements further down the line.

items.q: Can you keep an eye on my energy system remotely?
items.a: Yes. We set up monitoring so both you and we can see your system's output, battery level, and any alerts — at any time, from anywhere.

items.q: Do I need planning permission for solar panels in Spain?
items.a: For most home installations up to 10kWp, a simplified notification is all that's required rather than full planning permission. We'll guide you through what applies to your specific situation.

energy.pricingNote: Typical starting investment: from €1,500. Confirmed after free site assessment.

fincaCare.heading: Finca Care Subscriptions
fincaCare.subheading: Three tiers of always-on estate protection. From digital backbone management to full hands-off luxury coverage — your property, permanently looked after.

digital.name: Digital Core
features: Weekly automated backups — network config, smart scripts & NVR
Remote firmware & security patching, scheduled overnight
Real-time alerts — internet uptime, server health, battery degradation & leak sensors
Emergency call-out available at a reduced hourly rate

essential.name: Finca Essential
essential.tagline: Peace of mind for properties that sit empty.
features: Annual on-site audit — 1 full property walkthrough per year
Basic hardware maintenance: camera lens clean, sensor & rack inspection
One free emergency call-out per year included

elite.name: Absolute Elite
elite.tagline: Complete hands-off luxury property tech coverage.
features: Everything in Digital Core & Finca Essential
Quarterly on-site audit — 4 full visits per year
Deep hardware tune-up: server clean, solar panel calima wipe, battery diagnostics
Expedited emergency call-out included — priority response at no extra cost
Premium post-visit digital report with photos after every audit

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes. All three plans are rolling monthly subscriptions with no minimum term. Cancel with 30 days' notice.

items.q: What area do you cover for on-site visits?
items.a: We're based in Almansa and serve southeast Spain — Valencia, Alicante, Murcia, the Costa Blanca, and everything within roughly an hour's drive.

items.q: Is electrical work included?
items.a: We engineer, mount, and configure all technical infrastructure. High-voltage certified grid connections are coordinated via our licensed local electrician partners at transparent rates.

items.q: Do I need to be present during visits?
items.a: No. With key-safe or gate code access we complete all audits without you travelling to the property.

items.q: What happens if something breaks between scheduled visits?
items.a: Digital Core clients can call us out for emergency help at a reduced hourly rate. Finca Essential clients have one free emergency call-out per year included in their subscription. Absolute Elite clients receive an expedited emergency call-out for any failure — priority response, no extra charge.

items.q: Do you send a report after each on-site visit?
items.a: Finca Essential clients receive a digital report after their annual audit. Absolute Elite clients receive a premium report with photographs after every quarterly visit.

items.q: Is there a one-time setup fee?
items.a: A one-time onboarding assessment covers the initial site audit, system documentation, and plan configuration. The fee is quoted transparently at your first consultation.

promotion.headline: 20% off all plans — until 30 November 2026
promotion.body: To mark our public launch across southeast Spain, every Finca Care plan launches at 20% below standard rate. Clients who join before 1 December 2026 keep their 20% founder discount permanently — even if standard rates increase in the future.

billing.annualNote: Billed as a single annual payment · 12-month minimum commitment

serviceContext.heading: What is Finca Care?
serviceContext.body: Finca Care is an ongoing maintenance and monitoring service — not a requirement for any installation work. We install systems as a standalone job: networks, security, automation, solar. If you'd rather manage things yourself after that, no subscription needed. Finca Care is for owners who want us to keep an eye on everything all year round.

compliance.notice: NextGen Finca engineers, mounts, and configures all technical infrastructure. High-voltage certified grid tie-ins are coordinated via our network of licensed local electricians.

contact.heading: Request Your Free Estate Assessment
contact.subheading: Tell us about your property. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.responsePromise: Typical response: within 4 hours on a workday

success.heading: Request Received
success.body: We've got your request and sent a confirmation to your email. You can expect to hear from us within 4 hours on a workday.
success.checkEmail: Can't find it? Check your spam folder.
success.fincaCareBody: Recurring plans to keep your finca protected year-round.

error.heading: Something went wrong
error.body: We're sorry for the inconvenience — something went wrong on our end and your request may not have reached us. Please get in touch directly and we'll take it from there.

contact.basedInBody: We operate from Almansa in Castilla-La Mancha — ideally positioned to reach properties across the Costa Blanca and the provinces of Valencia, Alicante, Murcia, and Albacete within roughly an hour.

regions.heading: Based in Almansa. Covering Southeast Spain.
regions.subheading: We're located in Almansa and cover roughly everything within an hour's drive — the Costa Blanca, Valencia, Alicante, Murcia, Albacete, and the rural hinterland in between.

ctaBanner.heading: Ready to sort out your finca?
ctaBanner.subheading: Free assessment. No obligation. Response within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Smart Finca Solutions — Based in Almansa.
footer.regions: Based in Almansa · Serving the Costa Blanca & Southeast Spain

about.heading: Construction Know-How. IT Expertise. One Family Team.
about.intro: We moved to southeast Spain because we wanted to — and when we looked around, the opportunity was obvious. Great properties, frustrating technology. We had exactly the skills to fix that, so we built NextGen Finca.

sections.heading: Why We're Here
sections.body: We moved to southeast Spain because we wanted to — and when we looked around, the opportunity was obvious. Stunning properties with frustrating technology. No reliable internet, gates opened by hand, solar systems nobody had looked at in years. We knew exactly how to fix those things, so we built NextGen Finca to do it.

sections.heading: The Background
sections.body: Between us we have over eleven years of hands-on professional experience — half in construction and project management, half in IT infrastructure and smart home systems. In the Netherlands we spent years installing exactly the kind of setups we now bring to fincas in Spain: networks, security systems, home automation, and solar monitoring. For real clients, on real projects, with real deadlines.

sections.heading: How We Operate
sections.body: We're a small, focused team — not a franchise, not a call centre. Every project is handled by the same people who assess it, quote it, and install it. We relocated from the Netherlands to Spain to expand what we do, and we're applying the same professional standards that we've held for over a decade. We're growing our client base here deliberately, which means every job gets our full attention.

about.closingBody: A site visit costs you nothing. We'll come and look at what you have, tell you what we'd do, and give you a clear quote.

glance.label: At a Glance

stats.text: Years combined experience in construction & IT
Professionally active in the Netherlands — now based in Almansa, Spain
Disciplines under one roof: construction know-how + IT infrastructure

howWeWorkItems: No jargon — we explain everything clearly
You deal with us directly, not a call centre

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: Who We Are
sections.body: NextGen Finca is a technology and estate services company based in Almansa, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. We are the data controller for personal information collected through this website. Contact: info@nextgenfinca.com

sections.heading: What Data We Collect
sections.body: When you submit an enquiry through our contact form, we collect: your name, email address, phone number (optional), property location, property details (type, size, current internet setup, timeline), service interest, budget range, and any additional message you provide.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Data
sections.body: We use your information solely to respond to your enquiry, send you a confirmation email, and provide you with a quote or assessment for your property. We do not sell, share, or rent your data to third parties.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your enquiry data for up to 2 years to allow us to follow up and maintain a record of our communications. You may request deletion at any time.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You also have the right to restrict or object to processing, and the right to data portability. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@nextgenfinca.com.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: This website does not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics. We use only technically necessary functionality to operate the site.

sections.heading: Email Service
sections.body: Confirmation emails are sent via Resend (resend.com), a transactional email provider. Your email address is transmitted to Resend solely for the purpose of delivering your confirmation. Resend does not use your data for marketing.

privacy.contactBody: For any questions about your personal data, or to exercise your rights, please contact us directly:

promoBanner.text: Launch offer: 20% off all Finca Care plans — permanently, for clients who join before 1 December 2026.

items.title: 11+ Years Combined Experience
items.body: Half in construction, half in IT infrastructure. Both matter for this kind of work — most installers have only one.

items.title: Based Here, Not Dispatched
items.body: We live in southeast Spain. You get us directly — not a call centre, not a subcontractor sent from a city.

items.title: Professional-Grade Equipment
items.body: We install Ubiquiti, Victron, Starlink, and Reolink — what serious installations use, not consumer shelf products.

items.title: Documented Handover, Every Time
items.body: Every job ends with a written system summary and a full walkthrough. You know exactly what you have and how it works.

howItWorks.heading: From First Call to Working System

steps.title: Free Site Assessment
steps.body: We come to your property, look at what you have, and tell you exactly what we'd do and why. No cost, no commitment.

steps.title: Clear Quote, No Surprises
steps.body: You get a written quote with line items. We explain every choice. Nothing gets added after you say yes.

steps.title: Installation & Handover
steps.body: Most projects take 1–2 days on-site. We don't leave until it works, and you get a full written summary before we go.

items.q: Do I need to be at the property during installation?
items.a: No. Key-safe or gate-code access works fine. We complete the job and send you a full written handover with everything documented.

items.q: What does a typical project cost?
items.a: It depends on the property. A connectivity setup typically runs €900–€2,500. A full estate covering internet, security, automation, and energy is quoted per project after the free site visit — every finca is different.

items.q: Which areas do you cover?
items.a: We're based in Almansa and cover southeast Spain — Valencia, Alicante, Murcia, the Costa Blanca, and everything within roughly an hour's drive.

items.q: We're not in Spain full-time. Can you manage things remotely?
items.a: Yes — that's the whole point. Everything we install is remotely monitorable. Finca Care subscribers get proactive alerts if something needs attention.
